subject: POTUS
body:
Jeffrey,

Rumor at the PBI airport is President Trump is due to arrive PBI Monday the 16th and stay until 23rd or 24th.,

This means we can only arrive in PBI from Teterboro after the 16th.

Thx

Larry

Sent from my iPhone
